artifact_refs.description: Run-level metadata for the LISH-MoA TC1 human baseline.
Human-selected bank action IDs and the masked candidate-review context used for selection.
Author notes for the LISH-MoA TC1 human baseline.

notes: True bank-id TC1 human baseline authored against the current LISH-MoA candidate_actions.json. The human selected action IDs after reviewing a masked candidate menu grouped by action type with pros and cons; role, eval_stage, equivalence groups, and expected answers were not shown. Time was not instrumented; time_spent_seconds is a coarse 60-minute estimate for the manual review and selection session.
